product_overview: Brand Pulse OS is an AI-powered brand monitoring dashboard that helps users track public mentions, spot reputation trends, and turn insights into actionable content ideas and reports. It combines monitoring, analysis, and content-generation workflows in one web app.
core_goals: Monitor brand health through an overview of sentiment, tone trends, and top issues
Browse, filter, and inspect individual mentions to understand source context and AI analysis
Import mention data from CSV or JSON sources
Generate, save, use, and archive AI-assisted content ideas
Create hooks, captions, and review existing hooks/captions with AI scoring
Generate brand reports and export report details as PDF
Explore related brand intelligence views such as alerts, trends, competitor activity, geo buzz, media tone, slang, and social listening

features.name: Overview Dashboard
features.description: Provides a landing page summary of brand health, sentiment distribution, tone trends, and top issues, with a period-based view of the data.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See brand health score, sentiment distribution, tone trend, and top issues populated with data -> Change the period filter -> See the dashboard metrics refresh

features.name: All Mentions with filters and detail
features.description: Lets users browse all collected mentions, narrow them with filters or saved views, and open any mention for deeper AI analysis and raw source context.
user_flows: Navigate to /mentions -> See the total mention count and a populated mentions table -> Apply platform, sentiment, or date filters -> See the table and query state update -> Click a saved view -> See the preset filter applied -> Open a mention from the table -> See the mention detail page with AI analysis, raw payload, and source link

features.name: Import CSV/JSON in Sources
features.description: Allows users to bring mention data into the app by uploading a CSV or JSON file for parsing, deduplication, and analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to /sources -> See the connector directory and manual import area -> Choose a CSV or JSON file -> Submit the import -> See a success message with inserted and skipped counts -> Return to the sources page and observe the mention total increase

features.name: Content Idea Engine
features.description: Generates AI-derived content ideas from mention insights and lets users manage each idea’s status.
user_flows: Navigate to /content-ideas -> See the current active idea count and existing idea cards -> Generate new ideas -> See the list refresh with new idea cards -> Review an idea card’s priority, insight, audience pain, hook, angle, CTA, and why-now rationale -> Change an idea status to saved, used, or archived -> See the status badge update

features.name: Generate Content: hook and caption generation
features.description: Creates AI-generated hook options, body copy, caption text, and a CTA from a user-provided topic and optional content settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /generate-content -> Enter a topic for the content -> Optionally choose platform, content format, and goal -> Submit the generator form -> See multiple hook options, content sections, a caption, and a CTA appear -> Copy a generated result -> See the copied confirmation state

features.name: Generate Content: hook and caption review
features.description: Reviews an existing hook or caption with rubric-based scoring and keeps a running history of past reviews.
user_flows: Navigate to /generate-content -> Scroll to the review section -> Paste a caption or hook and choose a platform -> Submit the review form -> See a scored rubric breakdown and overall score -> Check the review history -> See the new review added to the top of the list

features.name: Reports generation
features.description: Generates daily, weekly, or monthly brand reports and supports browsing report details and exporting them as PDF.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> See the existing report list or an empty state -> Choose a report type -> Generate the report -> See a new report card appear with health score, total mentions, average risk, and top issue -> Open the report detail page -> Export the report as PDF

routes.description: Overview — brand health score, sentiment donut, tone trend chart, top issues, period filter
All Mentions — filterable/sortable table of all brand mentions with saved views
Mention detail — AI analysis alongside raw source payload and source URL
Sources & Connectors — connector status directory plus manual CSV/JSON import form
Content Idea Engine — AI-generated content ideas derived from mention data, with save/use/archive actions
Generate Content — AI hook/caption generator plus a hook & caption reviewer with review history
Reports list — generate and browse daily/weekly/monthly brand reports

features.name: Overview Dashboard
features.description: Landing dashboard showing brand health score, sentiment split, tone trend over time, and top issue bar list, filterable by period
user_interactions: Load the Overview page and see the Brand Health Score, sentiment donut, and tone trend chart populated with data
Change the period filter (e.g. 7d/30d) and see stats refresh

features.name: All Mentions with filters and detail
features.description: Browse all brand mentions in a table, filter by date range/platform/sentiment/issue category, open saved views, and drill into a single mention's detail page showing AI analysis and raw payload
user_interactions: Navigate to All Mentions and see the total mention count and populated table
Apply a filter (platform, sentiment, or date range) via the filter bar and see the URL and table update
Click a saved view chip to apply a preset filter
Click a row/mention to open its detail page
On the detail page, see AI analysis fields plus the raw source payload and an external source URL link

features.name: Import CSV/JSON in Sources
features.description: Upload a CSV or JSON export of mentions via a file input; the file is parsed, deduplicated, and each new row is run through AI analysis; success message reports counts, and the page refreshes to reflect the increased mention total
user_interactions: Navigate to Sources & Connectors page and see the connector directory and Manual Import card
Choose a CSV file (e.g. sample-import.csv) in the file input
Click "Import data" button
See a success status message reporting how many rows were inserted vs skipped as duplicates

features.name: Content Idea Engine
features.description: Generate new AI-derived content ideas from recent mention insights, and manage each idea's status (save, mark used, archive)
user_interactions: Navigate to Content Ideas and see the current count of active ideas
Click "Generate ide baru" button
Wait for the button to show a loading state, then see the idea list refresh with new idea cards (each showing priority score, source insight, audience pain, hook, angle, CTA, why now)
Click a status action (Simpan/Dipakai/Arsip) on an idea card and see its status badge update

features.name: Generate Content (hook & caption generator)
features.description: Fill in a topic plus platform/content-type/goal selects, submit, and receive AI-generated hook options, content body, caption, and CTA that can be copied to clipboard
user_interactions: Navigate to Generate Content page
Fill the required "Topik / isi konten" input with a topic
Optionally choose platform, content format, and goal from select dropdowns
Click "Buatkan hook & caption" submit button
See the result panel populate with multiple hook options, content body sections, a ready-to-use caption, and a CTA
Click a copy icon/button and see it switch to a "copied" confirmation state

features.name: Generate Content (hook & caption review)
features.description: Paste an existing caption/hook and platform, submit for AI review, and receive a rubric-scored evaluation (hook strength, curiosity gap, CTA strength, risk level, etc.) plus a running history of past reviews
user_interactions: Scroll to the "Review Hook & Caption" section on Generate Content page
Paste caption text into the textarea and choose a platform
Submit the review form
See a scored result with rubric breakdown and an overall score
See the new review appear at the top of the "Riwayat Review" history list

features.name: Reports generation
features.description: Generate a daily/weekly/monthly brand report summarizing health score, total mentions, sentiment split, average risk, and top issue, then browse the list and open a report detail for PDF export
user_interactions: Navigate to Reports page and see the existing report list (or empty state)
Choose a report type (Daily Brief/Weekly Insight/Monthly Brand Health) from the select
Click "Generate report" button
See the button show a loading state, then see a new report card appear at the top of the list with health score, total mentions, avg risk, and top issue
Click "Buka & export PDF" on a report to open its detail page

known_limitations.issue: App runs with AI_PROVIDER=mock and MOCK_CONNECTORS=true
known_limitations.impact: AI-generated content (ideas, hooks, reviews, reports) is produced by a mock provider rather than a live LLM, and connector data is simulated rather than live-crawled; content will be deterministic/templated rather than truly generative
All routes are publicly reachable without login; no auth flow to test
